description.value: Aura strong conjuration; CL 14th; Weight 6 lbs.; Price 50,302 gp DESCRIPTION This humble weapon appears to be little more than a crudely sharpened stake or makeshift spear, but in truth it is a far more formidable weapon. In addition to being a +2 undead bane spear, a heartswood spear deals bludgeoning damage when it is swung as a staff. When employed in such a manner, it also possesses the disruption property. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells heal, summon monster; Cost 25,302 gp
